name: Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, spices, and melted butter. Mix together and press into an 8x8-inch pan lined with tinfoil.
2. Place cream cheese in a large mixing bowl and beat until fluffy using an electric mixer.
3. Beat in sugar, then egg. Blend dry ingredients together and beat into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Add pumpkin to the mixture.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pan and bake at 325°F for about 40 minutes or until set.
6. Cool on a wire rack for one hour before refrigerating until serving time.
7. Garnish with whipped cream or topping just before serving. Serve like a pie or in smaller squares.
